case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. VS. NORVIN JAVIER VASQUEZ MONTOYA

docket_entries.description: SC-109(AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR) VERONICA ROSALES FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-04-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO OCT-04-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. ORDER TO DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE: NO APPEARANCES

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) VERONICA ROSALES, ASSISTANT MANAGER FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO, INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: S. KANE. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
